ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB-11-2013 AT 5:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERSSON, LEIF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARSI, HOURI $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $1000.00 AWARDED FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CC 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
